name: Libromancer Geek Boy
name_jp: リブロマンサー・<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｇ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ギーク</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ボーイ
desc: You can reveal 1 Ritual Monster in your hand: Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Libromancer" Spell from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Libromancer Geek Boy" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can reveal 1 Ritual Monster in your hand: Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Libromancer" Spell from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Libromancer Geek Boy" once per turn.
eff: You can reveal 1 Ritual Monster in your hand: Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Libromancer" Spell from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Libromancer Geek Boy" once per turn.

sets.set: Battle of Chaos Premiere! promotional card
25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
